paraphrased_evidence.A: It recasts pleasure as temporary relief within a conditioned craving cycle, then connects failed satisfaction and restrictive dieting to continued consumption, though sweeping comparisons and repeated promises weaken credibility.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It recasts pleasure as temporary relief within a conditioned craving cycle, then connects failed satisfaction and restrictive dieting to continued consumption, though sweeping comparisons and repeated promises weaken credibility.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Identical causal explanations, sequencing, and freedom framing produce equivalent persuasive movement; there is no differential mechanism between the blocks.
